languages.text: {n}Взгляд Дунавски становится рассеянным, несколько мгновений она шарит глазом по мостику, будто стремясь найти что-то.{/n} "Делать что должно. Я поняла вас, Лорд-капитан! Мы будем отстаивать свои традиции, что бы там не говорили остальные".

{n}Dunawski's gaze wanders, scanning the bridge for a few seconds as if she searches for something.{/n} "Do what's right. I hear you, Lord Captain! We'll stand by our traditions, regardless of what anyone else has to say."
languages.original_text: {n}Взгляд Дунавски становится рассеянным, несколько мгновений она шарит глазом по мостику, будто стремясь найти что-то.{/n} "Делать что должно. Я поняла вас, Лорд-капитан! Мы будем отстаивать свои традиции, что бы там не говорили остальные".

traits.locale_text: {n}Dunawski's gaze wanders scanning the bridge for a few seconds as if she searches for something.{/n} "Do what's right. I hear you, Lord Captain! We'll stand by our traditions, regardless of what anyone else has to say."

{n}Dunawski's gaze wanders, scanning the bridge for a few seconds as if she searches for something.{/n} "Do what's right. I hear you, Lord Captain! We'll stand by our traditions, regardless of what anyone else has to say."
"But what about truthfulness, Lord Captain? Or is it that there is no such thing as one single truth? And everything is permissible?"

{n}Dunawski's gaze wanders scanning the bridge for a few seconds as if she searches for something.{/n} "Do what's right. I hear you, Lord Captain! We'll stand by our traditions, regardless of what anyone else has to say."

{n}Dunawski's gaze wanders, scanning the bridge for a few seconds as if she searches for something.{/n} "Do what's right. I hear you, Lord Captain! We'll stand by our traditions, regardless of what anyone else has to say."

languages.text: 「でも、真実性はどうでしょうか、船長。それとも、真実というものは一つではなく、すべて許されるのでしょうか？」
languages.original_text: "But what about truthfulness, Lord Captain? Or is it that there is no such thing as one single truth? And everything is permissible?"

languages.text: {n}Dunawski'nin bakışları etrafta geziniyor, sanki bir şey arıyormuş gibi birkaç saniye boyunca köprüyü tarıyor.{/n} "Doğru olanı yapmak. Sizi duyuyorum Lord Kaptan! Başkalarının ne dediğine bakmaksızın geleneklerimizin arkasında duracağız."
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski's gaze wanders, scanning the bridge for a few seconds as if she searches for something.{/n} "Do what's right. I hear you, Lord Captain! We'll stand by our traditions, regardless of what anyone else has to say."

traits.locale_text: {n}Dunawski'nin bakışları etrafta geziniyor, sanki bir şey arıyormuş gibi birkaç saniye boyunca köprüyü tarıyor.{/n} "Doğru olanı yapmak. Sizi duyuyorum Lord Kaptan! Başkalarının ne dediğine bakmaksızın geleneklerimizin arkasında duracağız."

languages.text: {n}杜纳芙斯卡目光游移，在舰桥上扫视了数秒，仿佛在寻找什么。{/n}“做正确的事。我明白了，舰长大人！无论旁人怎么说，我们都会坚守自己的传统。”
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski's gaze wanders, scanning the bridge for a few seconds as if she searches for something.{/n} "Do what's right. I hear you, Lord Captain! We'll stand by our traditions, regardless of what anyone else has to say."

traits.locale_text: {n}杜纳芙斯卡目光游移，在舰桥上扫视了数秒，仿佛在寻找什么。{/n}“做正确的事。我明白了，舰长大人！无论旁人怎么说，我们都会坚守自己的传统。”

languages.text: {n}Dunawskis Blick wandert einige Sekunden lang über die Brücke, als würde sie etwas suchen.{/n} "Tun, was richtig ist. Ich verstehe, Lord Captain! Wir ehren unsere Traditionen, egal, was andere sagen."
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski's gaze wanders, scanning the bridge for a few seconds as if she searches for something.{/n} "Do what's right. I hear you, Lord Captain! We'll stand by our traditions, regardless of what anyone else has to say."

traits.locale_text: {n}Dunawskis Blick wandert einige Sekunden lang über die Brücke, als würde sie etwas suchen.{/n} "Tun, was richtig ist. Ich verstehe, Lord Captain! Wir ehren unsere Traditionen, egal, was andere sagen."

languages.text: {n}Dunawski balaye la passerelle des yeux pendant quelques secondes, comme si elle cherchait quelque chose.{/n} « Ce qui me semble juste... Je comprends, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! Nous serons fidèles à nos traditions, peu importe ce qu'en pensent les autres. »
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski's gaze wanders, scanning the bridge for a few seconds as if she searches for something.{/n} "Do what's right. I hear you, Lord Captain! We'll stand by our traditions, regardless of what anyone else has to say."

traits.locale_text: {n}Dunawski balaye la passerelle des yeux pendant quelques secondes, comme si elle cherchait quelque chose.{/n} « Ce qui me semble juste... Je comprends, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! Nous serons fidèles à nos traditions, peu importe ce qu'en pensent les autres. »

languages.text: {n}La mirada de Dunawski se pasea por el puente durante unos segundos, como si buscara algo.{/n} «Hacer lo correcto. ¡Entendido, Lord Capitán! Mantendremos nuestras tradiciones, independientemente de lo que puedan decir los demás».
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski's gaze wanders, scanning the bridge for a few seconds as if she searches for something.{/n} "Do what's right. I hear you, Lord Captain! We'll stand by our traditions, regardless of what anyone else has to say."

traits.locale_text: {n}La mirada de Dunawski se pasea por el puente durante unos segundos, como si buscara algo.{/n} «Hacer lo correcto. ¡Entendido, Lord Capitán! Mantendremos nuestras tradiciones, independientemente de lo que puedan decir los demás».
